# Mundus Trade

> B2B marketplace for global meat trading — connecting suppliers and buyers across beef, pork, poultry, and ovine.

Mundus Trade is an authenticated platform for international meat trading. Suppliers publish offers (FCL containers, IMPS cuts, incoterms, ports), buyers send requests and run structured negotiations up to 8 rounds with full price history. Most product surfaces require sign-in.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and entry point.
- [Sign in](/login): Existing buyer, supplier, or admin sign-in.
- [Create account](/signup): Apply to join as a buyer or supplier.
